news.t: Logan Capital Launches Large Cap Growth ETF (NYSE: LCLG)

holdings.infoBox: LCLG is an equity ETF with a total of 59 individual holdings. The top holdings are KLA Corporation stock at 7.41%, Micron Technology at 5.57%, Flex Ltd. at 5.53%, Amphenol at 5.14%, and Broadcom at 4.95%.

overview.description: The Logan Capital Broad Innovative Growth ETF (LCLG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively invests in a growth portfolio of primarily large-cap US-listed companies that use innovative technologies. Equities are selected based on macroeconomic, fundamental, and technical factors. LCLG was launched on Jan 1, 2022 and is issued by Logan.

data.title: Logan Capital Launches Large Cap Growth ETF (NYSE: LCLG)
data.text: NEWTOWN SQUARE, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Logan Capital, an independent, privately owned Registered Investment Advisor, has launched its first exchange-traded fund (ETF), the Logan Capital Broad Innovativ...
